## Skill submission checklist

**Skill name:** <!-- e.g. cdh-metadata -->

### Before opening this PR, confirm:

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has a `name` and `description` in the YAML frontmatter
- [ ] The `name` in frontmatter exactly matches the directory name
- [ ] The skill directory is placed under `.agents/skills/<skill-name>/`
- [ ] `evals/evals.json` contains at least 2 realistic test prompts
- [ ] All files referenced in `SKILL.md` (e.g. `references/`, `assets/`) are included
- [ ] No local machine paths (e.g. `C:\Users\...`) appear in `SKILL.md`
- [ ] The skill has been tested manually at least once

### What does this skill do?

<!-- 1–3 sentences describing what the skill enables and when it should trigger -->

### What datasets or workflows was it tested on?

<!-- List the files or scenarios you tried -->

### Any known limitations?

<!-- Optional — flag edge cases or things reviewers should pay attention to -->
